description:
lower_prim is ~770 lines covering 22 Prim variants. ~235 of those lines are collection
primitives that share state requirements and have no dependency on spec_registry, fn_ids,
param_reprs, or return_reprs.

Collection variants and their approximate line spans in lower_prim:
  ListCons, ListHead, ListTail, ListIsNil, MakeList (~40 lines)
  MakeTuple, TupleField (~25 lines)
  AllocStruct (~16 lines)
  MakeBitstring, BitReaderInit, BitReadField, BitReaderDone (~106 lines)
  MakeMap, MapUpdate, MapGet (~35 lines)
  MakeVec (~23 lines)

ADD before lower_prim:

  fn lower_collection_prim<M: cranelift_module::Module>(
      b: &mut FunctionBuilder<'_>,
      jmod: &mut M,
      env: &CodegenEnv<'_>,
      var_env: &HashMap<u32, VarBinding>,
      prim: &Prim,
      dest_var: crate::fz_ir::Var,
  ) -> Result<LowerOut, CodegenError>

Inside lower_collection_prim: re-bind the env aliases it needs (runtime, tuple_schema_ids).
The function should match only the collection variants and panic/unreachable on others.

IN lower_prim: replace each collection variant arm with a call to lower_collection_prim.
Or restructure as an early dispatch: check if prim is a collection prim at top of lower_prim,
forward to lower_collection_prim, else continue with the rest.

cargo build must produce zero warnings. All tests must pass.
title: fz-cg3.2 extract lower_collection_prim from lower_prim
